creator: raimeetravel
caption:
If you need a break from reality too…

👋 I’m @raimeetravel and I help you travel smarter with detailed tips & itineraries! I have a 9-5 job but travel the world whenever I can 🫶🏻

…these are some of my favorite other-worldly destinations (that can also be pretty budget friendly!)

My other love outside of travel is fantasy + sci-fi books & films — I mention a few of my faves here because they truly do inspire where I travel!!

When I have to fly through a metal tube in the sky…I want it to be worth it!!!

💬Comment ‘MAPS’ and I’ll send you my maps for all of these destinations!

Where else would you add? ✨🏔️🧝🏻‍♀️
.
.
.
New Zealand travel, Ireland travel, wild Atlantic way, Mexico City, Japan travel, Moorea travel, French Polynesia, Oxford England, Salt Lake City, a

transcription.text: maybe this is weird but i often choose my travel destinations based on whether they'll make me feel like i'm living in a fantasy world and i need a break from reality right now so here are eight of my favorites the first being morea in french polynesia this is like stepping into the world of moana it is a tropical fantasy paradise you can swim with humpback whales which is the most otherworldly experience number two is mata mata new zealand this is where they filmed the hobbit and lord of the rings and i had one of the happiest days of my life here it was perfect for disassociating which new zealand is great for that in general especially fjordland national park mist covered cliffs insane waterfalls i mean there have to be mythical creatures living here number three might be surprising mexico city just look at this crazy architecture this city has such an interesting blend of old and new ruins and colonial architecture and art and one of the best bookstores in the world fourth you knew i was gonna say this one iceland they call it the land of fire and ice for a reason it inspired scenes in game of thrones and tons of other fantasy films number five hear me out salt lake city particularly in wildflower season in late july early august it is so beautiful i felt like i was living in the spring court six ireland's wild atlantic way this is on the west coast and i felt like i was the only tourist there i don't know why this place isn't more popular it is so magical especially in spring or fall seven is japan one of my favorite countries in the entire world it feels like a studio ghibli film meets blade runner they are somehow living in both the future and the past which really gives it that fantasy sci-fi feel and finally eight oxford england they filmed a lot of harry potter here which makes it feel like you are attending a magical university
